items_all.title: AMD's next-gen 10-core 'Medusa Point' APU shows up on Geekbench again, with its best score yet — leaked SKU outpaces every other x86 mobile chip in the single-core test
items_all.summary: AMD's next 10-core mobile part from the Medusa Point family is looking a lot faster than its previous two Gorgon Point and Strix Point SKUs, respectively. Early leaks keep highlighting an ever-improving part that has just benched its best score yet.
items_all.title_original: AMD's next-gen 10-core 'Medusa Point' APU shows up on Geekbench again, with its best score yet — leaked SKU outpaces every other x86 mobile chip in the single-core test
items_all.title_en: AMD's next-gen 10-core 'Medusa Point' APU shows up on Geekbench again, with its best score yet — leaked SKU outpaces every other x86 mobile chip in the single-core test
items_all.title_bilingual: AMD's next-gen 10-core 'Medusa Point' APU shows up on Geekbench again, with its best score yet — leaked SKU outpaces every other x86 mobile chip in the single-core test
items_all.summary_zh: AMD 的 Medusa Point 系列下一款 10 核移动部件看起来比之前的两款 Gorgon Point 和 Strix Point SKU 快得多。早期的泄密不断凸显出一个不断改进的部分，该部分刚刚取得了迄今为止的最高分。

items_all.title: Zilog Z80 turns 50 as an open-source replacement heads to drop-in DIP40 silicon — iconic 8-bit CPU launched in July 1976 and was discontinued in 2024
items_all.summary: The original Z80 packed 8,500 transistors on a 4μm process and typically ran at 2.5 MHz.
items_all.title_original: Zilog Z80 turns 50 as an open-source replacement heads to drop-in DIP40 silicon — iconic 8-bit CPU launched in July 1976 and was discontinued in 2024
items_all.title_en: Zilog Z80 turns 50 as an open-source replacement heads to drop-in DIP40 silicon — iconic 8-bit CPU launched in July 1976 and was discontinued in 2024
items_all.title_bilingual: Zilog Z80 turns 50 as an open-source replacement heads to drop-in DIP40 silicon — iconic 8-bit CPU launched in July 1976 and was discontinued in 2024
items_all.summary_zh: 最初的 Z80 在 4μm 工艺上封装了 8,500 个晶体管，通常运行频率为 2.5 MHz。

items_all.title: Memory chip boss admits RAM prices are 'abnormally high' — SK Group chairman considering building a semiconductor plant in the US to expand supply, calm ‘chipflation’
items_all.summary: SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won said that prices for memory chips are "abnormally high" and that the industry must take steps to increase production and reduce prices. If it fails to do that, new entrants could challenge the incumbent leaders and make the market much more competitive, especially once demand falls back down to more manageable levels.
items_all.title_original: Memory chip boss admits RAM prices are 'abnormally high' — SK Group chairman considering building a semiconductor plant in the US to expand supply, calm ‘chipflation’
items_all.title_en: Memory chip boss admits RAM prices are 'abnormally high' — SK Group chairman considering building a semiconductor plant in the US to expand supply, calm ‘chipflation’
items_all.title_bilingual: Memory chip boss admits RAM prices are 'abnormally high' — SK Group chairman considering building a semiconductor plant in the US to expand supply, calm ‘chipflation’
items_all.summary_zh: SK集团董事长Chey Tae-won表示，存储芯片的价格“异常高”，该行业必须采取措施增加产量并降低价格。如果做不到这一点，新进入者可能会挑战现有的领导者，并使市场更具竞争力，特别是当需求回落到更易于管理的水平时。

items_all.title: Samsung cuts hundreds of US consumer electronics jobs ahead of Texas HQ move — 739 roles affected in New Jersey as chip division posts record profit
items_all.summary: Samsung told Reuters that a majority of the affected New Jersey employees received relocation offers, while others were let go.
